description: Runtime source-digest pin (order items 2/4): bind the exact installed Transformers source files the conversion/structural verifiers depend on to immutable public sha256 identities, so a source swap / monkeypatch / version drift is caught and the structural conversion inspection becomes admission-grade rather than a drift hint. Aggregate-only; public library identities only.

pinned_public_source_digests.note: public reproducible library-file identities (permitted immutable public identity); bound by equality via bind_source_digests; the structural conversion verification (AST) is now anchored to these pinned sources

runtime_tuple_status.implication: the installed runtime can structurally verify the standard numbered->packed conversion, but the GPTQModel+Defuser+TorchLinear differentiable activation-autograd fixture requires installing/pinning the GPTQ loader tuple -- a runtime-tuple decision flagged for the operator, not taken

operator_decisions_pending: repository visibility (public vs restore-private) -- gate unresolved
freeze + install the GPTQ loader tuple (Optimum / GPTQModel+Defuser) so the differentiable-runtime admission fixture can proceed

remaining_order.items_1_4_identity_binding: complete the full runtime-tuple freeze once GPTQModel/Optimum are installed (their source digests + dispatch)
remaining_order.differentiable_fixture: tiny synthetic Qwen3.5-MoE fixture through the real GPTQModel/Defuser/TorchLinear stack: defusion, per-quant-tensor consumption, forward + activation VJP/JVP parity vs dequantized ref, finite-diff, determinism, adversarial fails
remaining_order.then: Phase-0 conjunction; weights; authorized GPU transition; exact forward + VJP/JVP parity; lens fit

privacy: aggregate-only; public library version + reproducible source-digest prefixes, no host/private digests, tensor values, weights, caches, or local paths
